judgment.summary: Fast-growing SaaS company trading at a reasonable forward multiple, but currently unprofitable on a GAAP basis.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 31.0%; next earnings date is 2026-04-30.
positives: Revenue growth 31.7% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Forward P/E 13.24x — attractive for a growth name.
PEG ratio 0.66 — suggests potential undervaluation relative to growth.
Free cash flow $1.44B TTM — positive cash generation despite GAAP losses.
Analyst consensus is a strong buy with a high mean target price.
negatives: Operating margin -2.0% and Profit margin -3.5% — currently unprofitable on a GAAP basis.
Return on equity -19.3% and Return on assets -1.9% — negative returns on capital.
Current ratio 0.70 and Quick ratio 0.61 — liquidity could be a concern.

news.paragraph: There are no recent headlines for TEAM, leaving the stock's current narrative driven solely by its fundamentals. The upcoming earnings report on April 30th will be a key event to watch for any shifts in analyst sentiment or company guidance. Traders should consider the lack of immediate news flow when assessing short-term volatility.

examples.body: $TEAM Can the algo please rotate back into SaaS. Tired of these drops.
$NOW IGV almost green. Still down 3.5%. We really need some buyers. I bought $TEAM today. I’m tapped out.
$TEAM the sale was to cover tax liability. Why is the market getting so twisted
